---
title: "The Literature Replication: Based on R"
date: 2023-12-10
author: Jianqi Huang
categories: 
    - Micro
    - Econ
format:
  html:
    code-fold: true
image: images/rpp2.png
---
# The Literature Replication: Based on R

- Website: <https://jianqih.github.io/rrp/>

This book based on Chinese Micro-Datasets like CHFS,CFPS and CHARLS using R to replicate. It also replicates some famous paper. It will help to get a deeper understand for the economic data processing and the econometric methods.
